Meet Cocoro.

The new newest member of the Own The Doge family. This IP token is officially licensed by Atsuko.

COLLECT

COLLECT

Provenance coins for good.

Own The Doge is committed to giving back to charity at every pawsibility just like our inspiration Atsuko Sato, the Dogemother

Charity

Since inception, Own The Doge has donated over $2M USD to charities supporting dogs and kids. We are currently the all-time largest donor of crypto to Save The Children.

The Official Doge Store in partnership with Atsuko & Kabosu, where every purchase supports Save the Children.
